## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Add in-app notification center for transactions and system events
- Add user preferences for notification categories and channels
- Use mock notification and preference data sources
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Notification items show title, timestamp, status icon, and action
  - Unread items have clear visual distinction with left border accent
  - Preferences use toggle controls with 44px min touch target

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Notification list loads and paginates
- [ ] Read/unread states update correctly
- [ ] Preference updates persist in local storage/state
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (empty/unread/read/preferences)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `notifications`, `priority-medium`
